project_type: TypeScript monorepo - 13 interconnected apps with shared packages
test_framework: vitest with coverage-v8, Playwright for E2E (playwright.config.ts at root)
verification_instructions: Run pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm lint
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Node 22+, pnpm 10.28.1. No Docker daemon available for container builds.
contribution_requirements: All gates must pass: install, typecheck, test, build, lint. No fake completion signals. Performance budgets are gates.
key_patterns: Packages export from src/index.ts. Services are class-based with DI. Tests in __tests__/ dirs. Apps at apps/<name>/ with frontend and backend/ subdirs. Infra at infra/ with terraform/helm/argocd. Existing onboarding at packages/onboarding. Existing e2e helpers at packages/testing/src/e2e/. Existing Terraform staging+production at infra/terraform/environments/. Existing Helm chart at infra/helm/quant-platform/.
directory_structure: apps/ (13 app frontends+backends), packages/ (39 shared libs), services/ (17 infra workers), infra/ (terraform/helm/argocd/docker/grafana/prometheus/otel), scripts/, docs/, k6/ (load tests), models/ (ML models)
